data.raceName: WOLF SIGNS UP TO NR40 PATHWAY PACE MS
data.raceComments: {"comment":"3. THE BLACK FOX finished fourth last start over 2040m at this track, beaten 35 metres, after a modest sixth at Marburg the run prior. A nice draw on the front line should ensure a cosy run. Meets a similar quality field and is good enough to take out a race like this. 9. TAURUS BROMAC ran sixth last start at this track over 1780m, beaten 20 metres. Capable of playing a major role so has to be respected. 1. BETTOR DREAM SWEET didn't do a bad job when sixth over 2040m at this track last time out. 6. SAYCHELLES is worth some thought despite her last-start seventh over 1780m at this track on April 12.","runners":[3,9,1,6],"exclusive":false}
